message:
feat(ars): add disk serialization & auto-pruning garbage collector (ars_serialize)

ReflexStore with manifest, per-record JSON persistence, and blacklist.
PruneEngine detects e-value collapse, consecutive failures, and deprecated
overflow. Auto-blacklisting prevents reintroduction of pruned reflexes.

35 inline tests + 17 property-based tests = 52 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
